'''sawozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deaconship|deaconship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deaconship|deaconship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sawozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæwezheth|sæwezheth]] || [[word:sæwezhej|sæwezhej]] || [[word:sæwezhesh|sæwezhesh]] || [[word:sæwezhe|sæwezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawowozhoth|sawowozhoth]] || [[word:sawowozhoj|sawowozhoj]] || [[word:sawowozhosh|sawowozhosh]] || [[word:sawowozho|sawowozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawozhoth|sawozhoth]] || [[word:sawozhoj|sawozhoj]] || [[word:sawozhosh|sawozhosh]] || [[word:sawozho|sawozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawofzhoth|sawofzhoth]] || [[word:sawofzhoj|sawofzhoj]] || [[word:sawofzhosh|sawofzhosh]] || [[word:sawofzhof|sawofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sawozhotho|sawozhotho]] || [[word:sawozhojo|sawozhojo]] || [[word:sawozhosho|sawozhosho]] || [[word:sawozhoko|sawozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sawozhoth|sawozhoth]] || [[word:sawozhoj|sawozhoj]] || [[word:sawozhosh|sawozhosh]] || [[word:sawozho|sawozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sawozhothol|sawozhothol]] || [[word:sawozhojol|sawozhojol]] || [[word:sawozhoshol|sawozhoshol]] || [[word:sawozhokol|sawozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sawozhothotho|sawozhothotho]] || [[word:sawozhojojo|sawozhojojo]] || [[word:sawozhoshosho|sawozhoshosho]] || [[word:sawozhoko|sawozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sawozhothon|sawozhothon]] || [[word:sawozhojon|sawozhojon]] || [[word:sawozhoshon|sawozhoshon]] || [[word:sawozhokon|sawozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sawozhothoro|sawozhothoro]] || [[word:sawozhojoro|sawozhojoro]] || [[word:sawozhoshoro|sawozhoshoro]] || [[word:sawozhokoro|sawozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
